plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-438 RP14.P05.M02.S10-RP14.P05.M04.S07 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-438 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP14.P05 implementation slice: the M02 Type And Shape Definition tail (the eleven remaining rows), the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice cycle (twenty-two rows), and the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (the first seven rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H14), Claude review packet (C14), and CP00-439 handoff, without opening settlement, origination, allocation, or working credit runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-438 is a descriptor-only settlement-core (RP14) closeout pack covering 40 units (RP14.P05.M02.S10-RP14.P05.M04.S07): the M02 Type And Shape Definition tail (11 rows), the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice (22 rows), and the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (7 rows). Verified end-to-end consistency: pack baseline, plan pack, baseline.json, manifest, requirements, and per-unit deliverable types all agree on the 40-unit count and the deliverable (12 implementation / 4 security_audit / 14 fixture / 6 test / 2 hermes_evidence / 2 claude_review) and micro-title (11/22/7) distributions. The CP438 functions in registry.js, service.js, and validators.js follow the established frozen descriptor-only pattern; index.js re-exports them via wildcard; contracts/settlement-core-contract.json carries a matching p05_implementation_slice_descriptor projection plus cp438_requirements/cp438_no_write_attestation, and validate-rp14-settlement-core-contract.mjs enforces source<->contract parity via deepEqual and pins current_pack/historical tail to CP00-438. Tests in model.test.js cover coverage counts, descriptor-only row guards, and authority boundaries. No-write/no-real-data is sound: no fs/db/network/exec in packages/settlement/src, and freezeCp438Result asserts all write/runtime flags false with synthetic_only/no_real_data true. The production_ready claim is not overstated (manifest production_ready:false, status implemented_pending_review; production_ready_candidate is a local-validation-only flag deferred to human approval). Authority boundaries hold: this review run is read-only (Read/Grep/Glob), claude_is_final_approval:false, no enterprise-trust claim from local validation, and Hermes is used only for deterministic descriptor/evidence packets (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid JSON, no errors/warnings), forbidden_tools_present:false, summary-only review correctly disallowed for Risk B, active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, and forbidden_review_evidence enumerates auth-failure/zero-byte/malformed-JSON/fenced-JSON/tool-call-shaped/missing-field rejection cases. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one non-blocking P3 cosmetic note on scope-artifact labeling. Validation commands are claimed passed in command-evidence.json (exit 0); these were not independently executed under the read-only mandate, but source/contract/test/manifest alignment supports the claim.

findings.title: Scope artifact labels the pack's own manifest dir under unrelated_dirty_files_preserved
findings.details: changed-file-scope.json lists docs/closeout-packs/cp00-438/ (this pack's own manifest/command-evidence directory) and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md under both untracked_implementation_files (lines 131-132) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 137-138). The pack's own manifest directory is pack-related and is committed at closeout, so the 'unrelated' label is imprecise. This is purely a bookkeeping/categorization nuance in the scope artifact: the review-completeness gate active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty in both changed-file-scope.json (line 134) and validation-report.json (line 24), the manifest and command-evidence were present and reviewed, and active_pack_implementation_refs correctly enumerates only the settlement implementation files. No pack-relevant content was omitted from review.
findings.recommendation: Optionally refine the scope generator so the pack's own docs/closeout-packs/<pack-id>/ directory is categorized as pack-related (expected-untracked-until-commit) rather than 'unrelated', to avoid confusion in future review records. No change required for CP00-438 closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking cosmetic observation; does not affect pack or goal closeout. Acknowledge and proceed; defer generator tweak to a future tooling pass.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-438 settlement core p05 implementation slice descriptor pack
